product_data.Features: 65-inch OLED evo panel, 4K 120Hz, Dolby Vision IQ, Dolby Atmos, webOS 23, Game Optimizer with 4x HDMI 2.1 ports, AI Picture Pro

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message:
# Message to Seller

Hi there! 👋

I'm really interested in your LG C3 65-inch OLED TV — it looks like an amazing set with all those great features like the 4K 120Hz and Dolby Vision. 

I'm seriously considering making a purchase, but I was wondering if there's any flexibility on the price? I'd love to work something out if possible. What would you say?

Looking forward to hearing from you!

---

**Why this works:**
- Opens naturally and friendly without revealing negotiation intent
- Shows genuine interest in the specific product
- Politely asks about price flexibility without being aggressive
- Leaves room for the seller to respond and engage
- Short and to the point — respects their time

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message:
Hi there!

I'm glad to hear you're interested in the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV! It really is a fantastic set with all those top-notch features. I can definitely understand wanting to work out a deal. Let me see what I can do on the price for you. I'll get back to you soon with an offer. Thank you for considering this amazing TV!

Best regards,

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thanks for getting back to me! I appreciate you looking into this. I'm definitely interested in the C3, but I need to be upfront about my budget—I'm working with a maximum of $1,449.50. I know that's below the $1,799 retail, but I'm hoping we can find a way to make it work. What kind of pricing can you offer me?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I appreciate your honesty about your budget. Let me see what I can do to accommodate that. I'll work on finding a price that fits within your budget without compromising the value of the LG C3. I'll get back to you shortly with a proposal. Thank you for sharing your budget with me!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Great, I appreciate that! I'm looking forward to hearing your proposal. Just to clarify—I'm ready to move forward quickly if we can reach a price at or below $1,449.50. Looking forward to your offer.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Thank you for clarifying your readiness to move forward swiftly. I will prioritize finding a price that aligns with your budget of $1,449.50 or below. I'll work on this promptly and will be in touch shortly with a proposal that meets your requirements. Thank you for your patience and eagerness to proceed!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Perfect, thanks for prioritizing this. I'm ready to finalize the purchase as soon as we have an agreement within my budget. Looking forward to your proposal!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I appreciate your promptness and readiness to finalize the purchase. I'll expedite the process to reach an agreement within your budget. I'll be in touch shortly with the proposal. Thank you for your cooperation and enthusiasm in moving forward with the purchase!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thanks for your commitment to this. I'm standing by for your proposal. Looking forward to seeing what you can offer!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Thank you for your patience and collaboration throughout this process. I'm finalizing the proposal and will be sharing it with you shortly. I appreciate your anticipation and look forward to presenting you with an offer that aligns with your budget. Thank you for your continued interest in the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate your efforts! I'm ready whenever you have the proposal. Please go ahead and share the pricing offer so we can move forward.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Thank you for your understanding and readiness. I have crafted a pricing offer that aligns with your budget of $1,449.50. I will share the proposal with you now so we can proceed with the purchase. Thank you for your patience, and I look forward to moving forward with you!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Excellent! I'm ready to see the proposal. What's the price you're offering for the LG C3?
